body.thing: minion-tier ACI windowed Read on the coding path
body.intention: on the production coding split path, the model's Read is a paged 100-line window (with a range header) instead of a blind whole-file dump

body.narrative: Red = revert parent..HEAD except the test → aci_mode is unwired, so the coding architect's Read is a plain 3000-char dump with no window header → the 'lines X-Y of 500' regex misses → AssertionError. Green = aci_mode threads CodingDomain → ArchitectEditorFlow → architect loop → windowed Read. Proven on the split-ON production path (not a split-off shortcut), so the flow wiring must be correct for green.
body.why: SWE-agent: a tuned ACI beats a naive tool loop for the same model; a windowed viewer is the core (D-coding-loop-redesign)
